headline: Morgan Stanley Defends Memory Stocks Including Micron Technology (MU)
summary: Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) is one of the High Growth Semiconductor Stocks to Buy. On March 26, analyst Joseph Moore from Morgan Stanley issued a research note telling investors that the memory market remains more durable than the market thinks. He assigned a Buy rating on Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) and raised the price target […]

headline: Morgan Stanley has a stark message on Lockheed Martin stock
summary: Morgan Stanley reiterated its Equalweight rating and $675 price target on Lockheed Martin (LMT) following the company's announcement of a new framework agreement with the Department of War to quadruple production of the Precision Strike Missile. LMT shares were trading at $621.73 at the time of the ...

headline: Why The Liberty Global (LBTY.A) Story Is Shifting With A Higher Target And Cautious Rating
summary: Liberty Global’s analyst story has shifted, with a refreshed US$14 price target sitting against an updated fair value estimate of US$15.84 per share. Bullish views suggest this new target lines up with recent valuation work. More cautious voices highlight that an Equal Weight rating points to limited upside versus other sector names. As you read on, you will see how these price target moves fit into the broader narrative and what to watch next as it evolves. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: How The Story Is Shifting For East West Bancorp (EWBC) As Price Targets Reset
summary: East West Bancorp’s fair value estimate has been nudged lower from US$133.20 to US$132.06 per share, signaling a very modest reset in the price target rather than a major shift in the story. That small adjustment comes as Street analysts cluster around fresh targets through 2026, balancing confidence in core earnings drivers with questions about how much is already reflected in the recent share move. As you read on, you will see how these evolving price targets shape the current narrative and...

headline: Why The Narrative Around Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Is Shifting After Recent Analyst And News Updates
summary: Intercontinental Exchange has seen its fair value estimate nudged to US$197.21 from US$196.57, a small but telling adjustment to the anchor price target. Recent research activity, including both price target increases and trims, as well as at least one rating upgrade, shows analysts reassessing where the shares should trade and how much to pay for the company’s earnings power. Read on to see how to track these shifting targets and use them to follow the evolving narrative around the...

headline: Morgan Stanley delivers stark take for gold, stock market investors
summary: Gold was supposed to shine when everything else got messy. However, over the past three weeks, the opposite has occurred, and Morgan Stanley believes that’s a major bullish signal for stocks. Since the Iran war began on Feb. 28, gold prices have taken a dive, falling an incredible 18% and slipping ...
